Material component: For warm shield, a bit of phosphorus. For chill shield, a live firefly or glowworm, or the tails of four dead ones.

FIRE TRAP (Abjuration, Evocation) Level 4 | CT: 1 turn | Range: Touch | Duration: Permanent until triggered | Area: 5-ft radius | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Reflex half

Inscribes a magical trap on a closeable object — a book, bottle, chest, door. When opened by any unauthorized creature, the trap explodes for 1d4 + 1 per caster level fire damage in a 5-foot radius. Knock does not trigger or remove the trap. A failed attempt to remove it triggers detonation. Only one magical trap, ward, or lock may be placed on an object at a time.

Material component: Sulphur or saltpeter traced around the closure and touched to the object.

FUMBLE (Enchantment) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: 30-ft cube | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will negates*

Causes one creature per two caster levels in the area to become stumbling and fumbling with all actions. Affected creatures suffer −4 to attack rolls and Dexterity-based checks, have a 50% chance per round of dropping any held item, and move at half speed. A successful Will save (at −2 for creatures with fewer HD than the caster) means the creature is merely slowed: −2 to attacks, half speed, no dropping.

Material component: A cobblestone and a pinch of sand.

HALLUCINATORY TERRAIN (Illusion) Level 4 | CT: 1 turn | Range: 20 yards/level | Duration: 1 hour/level | Area: 10-yard cube/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will negates (disbelief)*

Disguises terrain within the area to appear as another type of natural terrain — hills masquerading as open fields, a swamp appearing as meadow, or vice versa. The illusion has visual, auditory, olfactory, tactile, and thermal components. Buildings, creatures, and equipment are not affected. A creature physically passing through terrain that contradicts its appearance (walking into an "open field" that is actually a bog) receives a strong bonus to disbelief. The illusion persists for those who believe it even after individual creatures disbelieve.

Material component: A stone, a twig, and a piece of green plant.

ICE STORM (Evocation) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 1 round (hail) or 1 round/level (sleet) | Area: 40-ft radius (hail) or 80-ft radius (sleet) | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Choose one effect at casting:

Hail: Large hailstones rain for one round, dealing 3d10 damage to all creatures in the area. Negates any Heat Metal damage on the same round.

Sleet: Driving sleet falls for the full duration, blinding creatures in the area, extinguishing open flames, and creating icy ground. Creatures in combat or moving through the area are slowed to half speed and have a 50% chance of falling prone each round.

Material component: A few drops of water and a pinch of dust.

ILLUSORY WALL (Illusion) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 30 yards | Duration: Permanent | Area: 1 × 10 × 10 ft section | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will negates (disbelief)*

Creates a permanent illusion of a wall, floor, ceiling, or similar architectural surface, complete with texture, color, and shadow. The illusory surface has no substance — creatures who disbelieve can pass through freely. A creature that touches the surface immediately gets a disbelief save.

Material component: A small sheet of parchment painted with the desired appearance.

IMPROVED INVISIBILITY (Illusion) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: Touch | Duration: 4 rounds + 1 round/level | Area: 1 creature | Comp: V, S | Save: None

As Invisibility, but the effect does not end when the recipient attacks or takes other hostile actions. The recipient remains invisible while fighting, casting spells, or otherwise acting. Attacks against an invisible target suffer the standard −4 penalty, and the target's attacks gain +4.

LEPRECHAUN'S SECURE SHELTER (Transmutation) Level 4 | CT: 3 rounds | Range: 20 yards | Duration: 1d4 hours + 1 hour/level | Area: 30 × 20 × 10 ft structure | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Conjures a sturdy one-story structure of opaque, waterproof, fire-resistant material in an unoccupied space. The interior contains simple furnishings for up to four creatures, with beds, a table, a locked door, and shuttered windows. The structure is impervious to normal weather and provides shelter from severe cold or heat. It vanishes and all contents fall to the ground when the duration expires.

Material component: A miniature clay model of a house.

MAGIC MIRROR (Enchantment, Greater Divination) Level 4 | CT: 1 hour | Range: Touch | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: 1 mirror | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Transforms a suitable mirror into a scrying device that functions as a crystal ball, allowing the caster to observe events at a chosen location. The mirror must be polished silver worth at least 1,000 gp. When activated, the caster may use the mirror's surface to observe a known location. The caster can hear sounds at the scried location if they are significantly loud. Lead sheeting and magical protections block the effect.

Material components: A silver mirror, powdered eye of a hawk, nitric acid, and gold dust to frame the mirror.

MASS MORPH (Transmutation) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 1 turn/level | Area: 1 creature/level in 20-ft cube | Comp: V, S | Save: None (willing only)*

Temporarily alters the appearance of willing creatures within the area, giving each the semblance of a different creature of similar size. Unlike Alter Self, the change is purely visual — no capabilities of the new form are gained. The caster must designate the new appearance of each affected creature at casting and cannot change it during the duration.

MINOR CREATION (Illusion) Level 4 | CT: 1 turn | Range: 0 | Duration: 1 hour/level | Area: 1 cu ft/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates a non-magical object made entirely of vegetable matter — wood, rope, cloth, and similar organic materials. The created object is permanent for the spell's duration, then crumbles to dust. It is physically genuine: it can bear weight, hold liquid, and be handled normally. It cannot duplicate the appearance of a specific object well enough to fool a knowledgeable observer, and magical properties cannot be created.

Material component: A tiny piece of the type of material to be created.

MINOR GLOBE OF INVULNERABILITY (Abjuration) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 0 | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: 5-ft radius around caster | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates a shimmering sphere that prevents all spells of 3rd level or lower from passing inward. Spells cast from within the globe can pass outward normally. Higher-level spells, physical attacks, and missile weapons pass through freely.

Material component: A small crystal sphere.

MNEMONIC ENHANCER (Transmutation) Level 4 | CT: 1 turn | Range: 0 | Duration: 1 day | Area: The caster | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Allows the caster to memorize three additional spell levels beyond their normal capacity — for example, three extra 1st-level spells, or one 2nd-level and one 1st-level, or one 3rd-level spell. Alternatively, the caster can retain any three spell levels already cast that day, recovering them as if they were still memorized. Both uses require a full turn of casting and are lost if the spell's duration expires before use.

Material component: A piece of string, a small coin, and an octopus tentacle.

MONSTER SUMMONING II (Conjuration) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 40 yards | Duration: 3 rounds + 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

As Monster Summoning I, but summons 1d3 creatures of approximately 2 HD. See Appendix C for summoned creature tables.

Material component: A tiny bag and a small candle.

PHANTASMAL KILLER (Illusion) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 5 yards/level | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: 1 creature | Comp: V, S | Save: Will then Fortitude*

Creates a manifestation of the target's deepest terror visible only to them. The target first makes a Will save — on a success, the image is recognized as illusory and the spell ends. On a failure, the creature perceives the phantasm as completely real and must immediately make a Fortitude save or die from shock. If the Fortitude save succeeds, the creature takes 3d6 damage from terror.

PLANT GROWTH (Transmutation) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 160 yards | Duration: Permanent | Area: 200 sq ft/level or special | Comp: V, S | Save: None

Causes normal plants to grow to overgrown profusion, creating a dense tangle. Any creature moving through the affected area is slowed to one-third normal movement and cannot charge or run. The growth does not harm the plants and is permanent until removed by mundane clearing (taking one day per square yard of dense growth) or Transmute Rock to Mud, Disintegrate, or a similar mass effect.

Alternatively, the caster can increase the size and productivity of a crop or garden, improving its yield by up to 50%.

POLYMORPH OTHER (Transmutation) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 5 yards/level | Duration: Permanent | Area: 1 creature | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Fortitude negates

Permanently transforms one creature into any other creature of the same approximate HD. The target's mind does not change — it retains its intelligence and memories — but the new body's instincts and nature exert constant pressure. For every week in the new form, the creature makes a Will save or lose one point of Intelligence as the new form's psychology asserts itself. At 0 Intelligence, the creature becomes the new form in mind as well as body.

The new form's AC, movement, attack forms, and physical capabilities replace the original's. Spell ability cannot be exercised in a form that cannot speak or gesture. The caster cannot specify the new form down to individuals — they can specify species, not specific creature.

Material component: A caterpillar cocoon.

POLYMORPH SELF (Transmutation) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 0 | Duration: 2 turns/level | Area: The caster | Comp: V | Save: None

The caster assumes the physical form of any creature they can imagine, with HD ranging from 1⁄4 to twice the caster's level. The caster does not gain the new form's special attacks, magical abilities, or supernatural powers — only physical capabilities: movement modes, physical form, size. The caster retains their own hit points, saving throws, and spellcasting ability (provided the new form can speak and gesture). The caster can change forms freely during the duration.

RAINBOW PATTERN (Transmutation, Illusion) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 10 yards | Duration: Special | Area: 20-ft radius | Comp: S, M | Save: Will negates*

A shifting, spiraling pattern of light fascinates up to 24 HD of creatures that observe it. Fascinated creatures are transfixed, unable to act while the caster moves or adjusts the pattern. The effect lasts as long as the caster maintains it (no concentration required, but the caster must move to maintain the pattern). Creatures that follow the pattern into danger do so willingly — the caster can slowly lead them. Physical disturbances break individual creatures' fascination. A light spell cast into the pattern neutralizes it.

Material component: A piece of crystal or a clear gem.

REMOVE CURSE (Universal; Reversible) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: Touch | Duration: Permanent | Area: 1 creature or object | Comp: V, S | Save: None (special)*

Removes one curse from a creature or object. Does not automatically undo the effects of a curse — it removes the magical binding, but physical changes caused by the curse may require additional magic to reverse. Against a cursed item, this allows the carrier to remove or discard the item, but does not make the item non-cursed. Does not remove all curses simultaneously; one casting removes one curse.

Reversed — Bestow Curse: The caster touches a creature and imposes one of the following effects (choose at casting): −4 to a specified ability score; −4 to all attack rolls and saving throws; 50% chance each round of being unable to act. The curse is permanent until removed. The target receives a Will save.

RESILIENT SPHERE (Transmutation, Evocation) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 20 yards | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: 1-ft radius/level sphere | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Reflex negates*

Creates a globe of shimmering force around one creature. The sphere is impervious to all damage and cannot be breached from without or within by any physical or magical means less than Disintegrate. Creatures inside can breathe and see normally but cannot act outside the sphere or use spell or item effects through it. The sphere can be rolled but not flown; it moves at the target's normal ground speed. A Reflex save allows a willing creature to step outside the range before the sphere closes.

Material component: A small, hollow glass sphere.

SHADOW MONSTERS (Illusion) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 30 yards | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: 20-ft cube | Comp: V, S | Save: Will (disbelief)*

Creates semi-real monsters formed from shadow matter. Each creature has 20% of the normal HP of the creature it imitates. Creatures that disbelieve treat the shadow monsters as having AC 10 and dealing 20% normal damage. Creatures that believe the monsters are real take full illusory damage (see Illusions, Chapter 14 opener).

SHOUT (Evocation) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 0 | Duration: Instantaneous | Area: 10 × 30-ft cone | Comp: V | Save: Fortitude (special)*

The caster emits a cone of devastating sound. All creatures in the cone take 2d6 sonic damage. Creatures failing a Fortitude save are deafened for 2d6 rounds. Crystalline objects in the area must save vs. crushing or shatter. Fragile structures take double damage. A creature using Shout in a confined space risks deafening themselves as well — a Will save is required to use this spell successfully indoors.

SOLID FOG (Transmutation) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 30 yards | Duration: 2d4 rounds + 1 round/level | Area: 20 × 20 × 20 ft | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates a thick, nearly tangible bank of yellowish fog. The fog is so dense that creatures within it move at one-third normal speed and cannot charge or run. Visibility is limited to 2 feet. Unlike Fog Cloud, the fog cannot be dispersed by wind — only fire (including Fireball and Flame Strike) can destroy it.

Material component: A pinch of dried peas and powdered animal hoof.

STONESKIN (Transmutation) Level 4 | CT: 1 round | Range: Touch | Duration: Special | Area: 1 creature | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Renders the recipient immune to all mundane physical attacks — non-magical weapons simply do not harm them. The protection absorbs 1d4+2 hits per 4 caster levels (maximum 1d4+6 at 16th level), after which the spell expires. Magical weapons, spells, and area effects bypass the protection. Touch spells that involve physical contact are blocked.

Material component: Granite and diamond dust worth 250 gp.

VACANCY (Transmutation, Illusion) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 1 hour/level | Area: 30-ft cube/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will negates*

Makes an area appear empty and uninhabited to observers from outside the area. Creatures inside become invisible and inaudible to those outside — not silenced, but undetected. Observers from outside see an empty room, a vacant camp, a deserted courtyard. The effect is an illusion of vacancy over reality, not a full concealment — creatures with true sight or detect magic see through it normally.

Material component: Two small pieces of empty cloth.

WALL OF FIRE (Evocation) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 60 yards | Duration: Concentration + 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None (special)*

Creates a sheetof magical fire. The wall can be a flat plane up to 20 feet long and 20 feet high, or a ring up to 10 feet in diameter per two caster levels. Creatures passing through the wall take 2d6+4 fire damage; creatures within 10 feet take 1d6+2 per round from radiant heat. The wall is opaque — creatures on one side cannot see the other. Can be shaped to exclude areas.

Material component: Phosphorus.

WALL OF ICE (Evocation) Level 4 | CT: 4 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 1 turn/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None (special)*

Creates a sheet of ice 1 inch thick per caster level. The wall can be a flat plane (10 sq ft per level) or a dome hemisphere (10-ft radius per 4 levels). Creatures passing through take 2d6 cold damage, plus an additional 1d6 if they lack fire protection. Creatures of cold origin cannot pass through it at all. Fire effects striking the wall remove 1d6 HP of wall per die of fire damage — a 6d6 fireball removes 6d6 HP of wall.

Material component: A small piece of white quartz or crystal.

WIZARD EYE (Transmutation) Level 4 | CT: 1 turn | Range: Unlimited | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates an invisible, immobile magical sensor that the caster can direct within range. The eye moves at MV 9, cannot pass through solid objects but can slip through any opening large enough to be seen through (keyholes, cracks). The caster sees through the eye as normal vision (infravision if the caster has it). The eye creates a visible sensor that can be detected by detect magic and dispelled by dispel magic. The caster must remain stationary to control it.

Material component: A piece of glass or crystal lens.

5th-Level Wizard Spells ​

ADVANCED ILLUSION (Illusion) Level 5 | CT: 1 round | Range: 60 ft + 10 ft/level | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: 40-ft cube + 10-ft cube/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will (disbelief)*

As Spectral Force but requires no concentration — the illusion runs on a pre-programmed sequence set by the caster at casting. Visual, auditory, olfactory, and thermal components. Creatures attempting to disbelieve make a Will save modified by Wisdom.

Material component: A bit of fleece and a pinch of sand.

AIRY WATER (Transmutation) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 0 | Duration: 1 turn/level | Area: 10-ft radius sphere | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates a breathable environment within a bubble of transformed water. Creatures inside move and breathe as if in air. Water-breathing creatures cannot breathe inside the bubble and naturally avoid it, though they may enter willingly. The bubble moves with the caster and cannot be cast underwater while silenced — but the verbal component is minimal enough to be spoken quietly while submerged.

Material component: A small handful of alkaline or bromine salts.

ANIMAL GROWTH (Transmutation) Level 5 | CT: 8 | Range: 80 yards | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: Up to 8 animals in a 20-ft square | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Doubles the size of up to eight animals within the area. Doubled animals have doubled HD, HP, and damage. Their movement and AC are unchanged. Their weight increases eightfold. The reverse, Shrink Animal, halves size, HD, HP, and damage.

Material component: A pinch of powdered bone.

ANIMATE DEAD (Necromancy) Level 5 | CT: 5 rounds | Range: 10 yards | Duration: Permanent | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Animates the bones or bodies of the recently dead as skeletons or zombies. The total HD of undead created cannot exceed the caster's level. Humans and humanoids with fewer than 2 HD in life become 1 HD skeletons or 2 HD zombies. The animated undead obey the caster's simple commands. They are not affected by Dispel Magic but can be turned or destroyed.

The ethical weight of this spell is substantial and varies by culture and tradition. Creating undead from unclaimed corpses may be legally acceptable in some regions; animating individuals without consent, or using bodies claimed by a faith's burial rites, is treated as desecration in most civilized lands. Very few Clerics of good or neutral alignment will animate humanoid dead without first seeking express consent through Speak With Dead.

Material component: A drop of blood and a pinch of bone dust.

AVOIDANCE (Abjuration, Transmutation) Level 5 | CT: 3 | Range: Touch | Duration: Permanent | Area: 1 object | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Fortitude negates (creatures)*

Enchants an object to be avoided. Any creature approaching within 10 feet that fails a Fortitude save is repelled and cannot move closer for the spell's duration — they simply do not want to approach and will find reasons to leave. The spell cannot repel creatures of greater HD than the caster's level.

Material component: A small magnet and a repellant (garlic, sulfur, or similar).

BIG INTERPOSING HAND (Evocation) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates a Large-sized, human-shaped hand of magical force. The hand interposes itself between the caster and one designated opponent within range, moving each round to maintain its position. The hand does not attack — it blocks, providing full cover (+4 AC) and absorbing attacks directed at the caster. The hand has AC 10, HP equal to the caster's maximum, and saves as the caster. It can hold back creatures of up to Large size. Slows creatures of Huge size by 50% if they weigh more than 900 kg.

Material component: A soft glove.

CHAOS (Enchantment) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 5 yards/level | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: 40-ft cube | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Special*

Functions as Confusion except only warriors, enchanters, non-intelligent creatures, and creatures with Intelligence above 20 or with more HD than the caster are allowed a Will save.

Material component: A small bronze disc and a small iron rod.

CLOUD KILL (Evocation) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 10 yards | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: 40 × 20 × 20-ft cloud | Comp: V, S | Save: Fortitude (special)*

A drifting mass of sickly yellowish-green vapors, heavier than air, moves from the caster at 10 feet per round. Creatures with fewer than 4+1 HD caught in the cloud die instantly. Creatures with 4+1 to 5+1 HD must make Fortitude saves (−4 penalty) each round or die; those with 6 HD or more take 1d10 damage per round. Moderate wind deflects the cloud; strong wind disperses it in 4 rounds; extremely thick vegetation disperses it in 2 rounds. Cannot be cast underwater.

CONE OF COLD (Evocation) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 0 | Duration: Instantaneous | Area: Cone, 5 ft long + 1 ft diameter/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Reflex half

A blast of intense cold erupts from the caster's hands. Deals 1d4+1 cold damage per caster level to all creatures in the cone.

Material component: A small glass or crystal cone (shattered upon casting).

CONJURE ELEMENTAL (Conjuration) Level 5 | CT: 1 turn | Range: 60 yards | Duration: 1 turn/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Summons an 8 HD elemental — Air, Earth, Fire, or Water — as chosen when the spell is memorized (each type may only be conjured once per day). The caster must maintain concentration to control the elemental; if concentration breaks or the caster is damaged, the elemental turns on the caster. The elemental can be directed within 30 yards per caster level; beyond this it goes rogue. There is a 5% cumulative chance per round after the first that the elemental breaks free regardless of concentration.

Material component: Appropriate to elemental type — incense for Air, soft clay and earth for Earth, sulphur and phosphorus at a bonfire for Fire, water and sand at a body of water for Water.

CONTACT OTHER PLANE (Greater Divination) Level 5 | CT: 1 turn | Range: 0 | Duration: Special | Area: Special | Comp: V | Save: None

Allows contact with an extra-planar being to ask one question per two caster levels. The being answers in single words. The caster risks temporary insanity based on how distant a plane they contact. Modifiers to the insanity check are reduced by 5% per point of Intelligence above 15.

PlaneInsanity CheckDurationKnowledgeVeracity
Elemental20%1 week55%62%
Other Inner25%2 weeks60%65%
Astral30%3 weeks65%67%
Outer, Int 1935%4 weeks70%70%
Outer, Int 2040%5 weeks75%73%
Outer, Int 2145%6 weeks80%75%
Outer, Int 2250%7 weeks85%78%
Outer, Int 2355%8 weeks90%81%
Outer, Int 2460%9 weeks95%85%
Outer, Int 2565%10 weeks98%90%

If insanity occurs, a Remove Curse must be cast, or the caster faces a 1% chance per week of insanity of dying at a random moment before recovery. When recovery is complete, the caster remembers the answer.

DEMI-SHADOW MONSTERS (Illusion) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 30 yards | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: 20-ft cube | Comp: V, S | Save: Will (disbelief)*

As Shadow Monsters, but the creatures have only 40% of normal HP. Creatures that disbelieve take only 40% damage and fight the shadow as AC 8.

DISMISSAL (Abjuration) Level 5 | CT: 1 round | Range: 10 yards | Duration: Permanent | Area: 1 extraplanar creature | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Fortitude negates*

Banishes one extraplanar creature to its home plane. The creature's HD versus caster level modifies the save (higher creature HD = bonus; higher caster level = penalty). Willing creatures are automatically dismissed. A 20% chance exists that an unwillingly dismissed creature arrives at a random plane rather than its own.

The caster also has a 50% chance to banish a rogue elemental.

Material component: An item distasteful to the target creature.

DISTANCE DISTORTION (Transmutation) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 2 turns/level | Area: 100-ft cube/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Requires an earth elemental conjured and on hand before casting. The elemental voluntarily merges with the spell, making the effective area either twice as large or half its size — travellers crossing the area take twice as long or half as long depending on the chosen distortion. The distortion is visually undetectable, though it radiates a dim magical aura. When the spell ends, the elemental returns home and the space reverts.

Material component: A small lump of soft clay.

DOMINATION (Enchantment) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: Special | Area: 1 humanoid | Comp: V, S | Save: Will (−2 penalty) negates

As Charm Person but the caster gains direct mental control rather than affection. Once established, mental commands function at any range on the same plane — no verbal communication required. The subject refuses suicidal commands and commands against their deepest nature (each such command allows a new save at +1 to +4). Protection from Evil blocks further commands but does not dispel the initial effect.

DREAM (Illusion, Evocation; Reversible) Level 5 | CT: 1 turn | Range: Touch | Duration: Special | Area: 1 sleeping creature | Comp: V, S | Save: None (Reversed: Will negates)*

The caster (or a designated creature touched during casting) enters a trance and delivers a message of any length into a sleeping target's dream. The target must be asleep; if awake when the spell is cast, the caster waits in the trance until the target sleeps. The target remembers the message perfectly. The caster is completely defenseless while in the trance.

Reversed — Nightmare: Sends horrifying visions. On a failed Will save, the target takes damage equal to their HD+1 (max 10 points), wakes fatigued, and cannot memorize spells that day. Damage cannot kill — victims reduced to 0 or less fall comatose.

EXTENSION II (Transmutation) Level 5 | CT: 4 | Range: 0 | Duration: Special | Area: Special | Comp: V | Save: None

As Extension I, but affects 1st through 4th level wizard spells.

FABRICATE (Transmutation, Enchantment) Level 5 | CT: Special | Range: 5 yards/level | Duration: Permanent | Area: 1 cu yd/level (soft) or 1 cu ft/level (hard) | Comp: V, S | Save: None

Transforms raw material into a finished product of the same material — wood becomes planks or furniture, fiber becomes cloth, stone becomes shaped masonry. The quality of the product reflects both the raw material's quality and the caster's proficiency in the relevant craft. Items requiring exceptional craftsmanship require a caster who is also a skilled craftsman. Cannot create magical items or work with living matter.

Casting time: one round per cubic yard (or foot) of material.

Material component: The raw material itself.

FALSE VISION (Greater Divination) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 0 | Duration: 1d4 rounds + 1 round/level | Area: 30-ft radius | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates a false magical "image" of the area that will be reported by any scrying spell or device looking in. The caster programs the false image at casting — it can be simply an empty room, or a detailed fabrication including activity. Any scrying directed at the area during the spell's duration receives the false image.

Material component: Ground jade and powdered lodestone.

FEEBLEMIND (Enchantment) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: Permanent | Area: 1 creature | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will (modified)*

Reduces the target's Intelligence to 1, effectively destroying cognitive function while leaving basic survival instincts intact. The target cannot cast spells, speak coherently, use skills requiring thought, or recognize friends. The save is modified by Intelligence and class: wizards save at a −5 penalty, priest-wizards at −3, bards at −2. Clerics, druids, and characters without arcane training save normally.

Material component: A handful of clay, crystal, glass, or mineral spheres.

HOLD MONSTER (Enchantment) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 5 yards/level | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: 1–4 creatures in 40-ft cube | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will negates

As Hold Person but affects any creature except undead. Targeting one creature imposes a −3 save penalty; two creatures −1; three or four, no penalty.

Material component: A small, hard metal bar or nail for each creature targeted.

LEPRECHAUN'S LAMENTABLE BELABORMENT (Enchantment, Evocation) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 10 yards | Duration: Rounds, then 1 turn/level | Area: 1 creature | Comp: V, S | Save: Will each round*

The caster assaults one creature with an escalating barrage of demanding questions and confusing commentary. Each round the creature fails a Will save, it is confused as per the Confusion spell. After the first failed save, subsequent saves use the target's previous result as a modifier (cumulative). Once the creature finally fails, the target becomes bereft — standing stupidly and unable to function — for 1 turn per caster level.

LEPRECHAUN'S SECRET CHEST (Transmutation) Level 5 | CT: 1 turn | Range: Special | Duration: 60 days | Area: 1 chest | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Hides a chest and its contents in the Ethereal Plane for up to 60 days. The chest can hold up to 250 kg of non-living material. The caster recalls it to the Prime Material by touching a small replica chest (which must be crafted from the same materials as the hidden chest, worth at least 5,000 gp) and concentrating for a round. If the replica is lost or destroyed, the chest is lost permanently.

Material component: The miniature replica chest.

MAGE'S FAITHFUL HOUND (Conjuration) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 10 yards | Duration: 2 rounds/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Conjures an invisible spectral hound that stands guard at a chosen location. Any creature approaching within 30 feet that the caster would not recognize as friendly triggers the hound to bark — a sound that wakes the caster at any distance. Any creature touching or attempting to pass the hound within 5 feet triggers an attack: +3 to AB, 2d6 damage per bite, capable of multiple attacks per round equal to the caster's level. The hound only attacks; it cannot be harmed physically but can be dismissed by Dispel Magic.

Material component: A tiny silver whistle and a snippet of bone.

MAGIC JAR (Necromancy) Level 5 | CT: 1 round | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: Special | Area: 1 creature | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will negates*

The caster's life force leaves their body and enters a prepared receptacle — the magic jar — from which they can attempt to possess any creature within range. The caster makes an opposed Will check against the target; on success, the caster's consciousness inhabits the target's body, with access to its physical abilities but not its spell memory or class abilities. The caster's own body remains comatose. If the possessed body dies, the caster's life force returns to the jar. If the jar is destroyed, the caster dies.

Material component: The prepared receptacle (a gem or crystal of at least 100 gp).

MAJOR CREATION (Illusion) Level 5 | CT: 1 turn | Range: 10 yards | Duration: Special | Area: 1 cu ft/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

As Minor Creation but can create mineral matter in addition to vegetable matter. Duration for vegetable materials: 1 hour/level. Duration for minerals: 1 turn/level. Duration for metals: 2 rounds/level. The more valuable or exotic the material, the shorter the duration.

Material component: A tiny piece of the material to be created.

MONSTER SUMMONING III (Conjuration) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 50 yards | Duration: 4 rounds + 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

As Monster Summoning I, but summons 1d3 creatures of approximately 3 HD. See Appendix C.

PASS WALL (Transmutation) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 30 yards | Duration: 6 turns + 1 turn/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates a 10-foot-deep passage through any solid wall of stone, plaster, or similar material. The passage is 5 feet wide and 8 feet tall. The passage closes when the duration expires, potentially trapping those inside. Multiple Pass Wall spells in the same location can create a passage of any depth.

Material component: A pinch of sesame seeds.

SEEMING (Illusion) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 12 hours | Area: 1 creature/2 levels | Comp: V, S | Save: Will (disbelief)*

As Alter Self but affects one creature per two caster levels simultaneously. The caster specifies the appearance of each recipient. The changes are purely visual — each recipient's physical abilities, senses, and capabilities are unchanged. After 12 hours the illusion ends; creatures observing its end are entitled to reflect on what just happened.

SENDING (Evocation) Level 5 | CT: 1 turn | Range: Unlimited | Duration: Special | Area: 1 creature | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Delivers a short message of up to 25 words to any known creature on the same plane. The message arrives instantly; the recipient can send a 25-word reply. Extra-planar sending attempts may fail at the GM's discretion. The spell does not identify the sender unless they choose to be identified.

Material component: Fine copper wire.

SHADOW DOOR (Illusion) Level 5 | CT: 2 | Range: 10 yards | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S | Save: None

Creates an illusory door in a wall, floor, or ceiling. The caster can freely pass through it; other creatures see only a door and are subject to the illusion. On the caster's side, the door appears open; on the other side, it appears closed. The caster emerges from shadow near the illusory door and is effectively invisible until they attack or move at full speed.

SHADOW MAGIC (Illusion) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 50 yards + 10 yards/level | Duration: Special | Area: Special | Comp: V, S | Save: Special (disbelief)*

Duplicates any Evocation spell of 4th level or lower using shadow matter from the Plane of Shadow. If the target disbelieves, the effect is only 20% effective (20% damage, etc.). The caster must know the spell being duplicated to use it through Shadow Magic.

STONE SHAPE (Transmutation) Level 5 | CT: 1 round | Range: Touch | Duration: Permanent | Area: 3 cu ft + 1 cu ft/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Reshapes one piece of stone into any form the caster desires. The stone's mass remains constant — it cannot be dissolved or expanded. Simple shapes (a plug, a step, a blade) are easy; complex or moving parts have a 1 in 4 chance of not functioning properly. Cannot create precious stones or magical effects within the stone.

Material component: Soft clay (shaped into the desired form before casting).

SUMMON SHADOW (Conjuration, Necromancy) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 10 yards | Duration: 1 round + 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Summons 1 shadow per three caster levels from the Plane of Shadow. The shadows serve the caster and attack on command, lasting until destroyed or the duration expires. Shadows created by creatures slain by these summoned shadows do not serve the caster.

Material component: A piece of material from a shadow.

TELEKINESIS (Transmutation) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 2 rounds + 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S | Save: Special (willing targets)*

Moves objects or creatures at a distance by mental force. Sustained Telekinesis can move up to 25 kg per caster level at MV 2. Violent Telekinesis moves up to 7 kg per level as a hurled weapon — attack roll required, 1d6 damage per 750 grams (max 15d6), Reflex half. The caster may also attempt to seize and move a creature; unwilling creatures make a Fortitude save to resist.

TELEPORT (Universal) Level 5 | CT: 2 | Range: Touch | Duration: Instantaneous | Area: The caster + 250 lbs/level | Comp: V | Save: None

Transports the caster and up to 250 lbs per level to a known destination. The success of the teleport depends on how well the caster knows the destination.

FamiliarityOn TargetOff TargetMishap
Studied carefully01–9798–9900
Seen casually01–9495–9798–00
Viewed once01–8889–9495–00
Described01–7677–8889–00

An "Off Target" result places the teleporter 1d10 × 10 metres in a random direction. A "Mishap" result is fatal — the caster materializes partially inside solid matter.

TRANSMUTE ROCK TO MUD (Transmutation; Reversible) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: Special | Area: 2 cu ft/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Transforms rock or stone into mud. Natural stone becomes 2 feet of mud per caster level, typically creating a deep mire. Creatures caught in the new mud may sink (Fortitude to avoid). The mud dries to rock over 1d6 days or can be instantly reverted by the reverse.

Reversed — Transmute Mud to Rock: Solidifies existing mud into rock permanently.

Material component: Clay and water (for rock to mud); sand, lime, and water (for mud to rock).

WALL OF FORCE (Evocation) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 30 yards | Duration: 1 turn + 1 round/level | Area: 20 sq ft/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates an invisible, flat plane of magical force. Completely impervious to physical damage, almost all spells, and most magical effects. Disintegrate destroys it instantly. Creatures and objects cannot pass through from either direction. Transparent to vision.

Material component: A pinch of powdered quartz.

WALL OF IRON (Evocation) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 5 yards/level | Duration: Permanent | Area: 5 sq ft/level, 1 in thick/4 levels | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Conjures a vertical wall of solid iron. The wall is permanent and can fall if unsupported — the caster can choose to make it fall on a specific side immediately, dealing 4d10 damage to creatures beneath (Reflex to dodge). The wall can be attacked and damaged as normal iron.

Material component: A small piece of iron sheet.

WALL OF STONE (Evocation) Level 5 | CT: 5 | Range: 5 yards/level | Duration: Permanent | Area: 5 sq ft/level, 1 ft thick/4 levels | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates a permanent wall of stone. The wall merges with existing stone if adjacent, making it significantly harder to destroy. Can be shaped into any flat or curved form within the area, including arches and tunnels. Can trap creatures if shaped around them (Reflex to avoid). Permanent and cannot be dispelled.

Material component: A small block of granite.

6th-Level Wizard Spells ​

ANTI-MAGIC SHELL (Abjuration) Level 6 | CT: 1 | Range: 0 | Duration: 1 turn/level | Area: 1-ft radius/level sphere | Comp: V, S | Save: None

Creates a mobile shell around the caster that blocks all magical effects from entering or leaving. No spell can be cast into or out of the shell. Magical items do not function within it. The caster is sealed within the shell — they cannot cast spells either, and any ongoing magical effects on the caster are suppressed. The shell does not affect physical attacks or non-magical items.

BIG FORCEFUL HAND (Evocation) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

As Big Interposing Hand but the hand actively pushes opponents back. The hand can push one creature per round: Small creatures are pushed back 5 yards per round; Medium creatures 3 yards; Large creatures 1 yard. The hand can also make a bludgeoning attack — AB equal to a warrior of the caster's level, 2d6+5 damage. The hand blocks passage through its space for creatures of Large size or smaller.

Material component: A soft glove.

CHAIN LIGHTNING (Evocation) Level 6 | CT: 5 | Range: 40 yards + 5 yards/level | Duration: Instantaneous | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Reflex half*

Discharges a bolt of electricity at one primary target for 1d6 per level (max 12d6). The bolt then arcs to the nearest creature (chosen randomly if equidistant), reducing damage by 1d6 with each arc. No creature can be struck twice. The bolt arcs until damage is reduced to 0d6, it strikes a large metal grounding object, or no more valid targets exist. The caster can be struck. Saves apply to each arc individually.

Material component: Fur, a piece of amber, glass, or crystal rod, and one silver pin per caster level.

CONJURE ANIMALS (Conjuration) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 30 yards | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: 30-yard radius | Comp: V, S | Save: None

Conjures a number of HD of animals up to twice the caster's level (random animals) or up to the caster's level (requested species). The animals fight on command against designated opponents. If commanded to perform any non-combat action, they may refuse, flee, or turn on the caster.

CONTINGENCY (Evocation) Level 6 | CT: 1 turn | Range: 0 | Duration: 1 day/level | Area: The caster | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Cast alongside a secondary spell (of level ≤ one-third the caster's level, max 6th), the caster sets a trigger condition. When the condition occurs, the secondary spell activates automatically and instantly. Only one Contingency can be active at a time. The secondary spell must be one that affects only the caster.

Material component: 100 gp worth of quicksilver, an eyelash from a mage or similar creature, and a carved statuette of the caster in elephant ivory.

CONTROL WEATHER (Transmutation) Level 6 | CT: 1 turn | Range: 0 | Duration: 4d6 hours | Area: 4d4 square miles | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Shifts weather in the area by one category in the desired direction per aspect (precipitation, temperature, wind speed, wind direction). The change takes 1d4 turns to manifest. Cannot reduce weather below minimum or above maximum categories. Subsequent castings can stack. Common sense governs — blizzards in tropical heat are not possible.

Material component: Incense and small bits of earth, wood, and water mixed together.

DEATH FOG (Transmutation, Evocation) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 30 yards | Duration: 1d4 rounds + 1 round/level | Area: 2 ten-ft cubes/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates a fog bank identical in appearance to Fog Cloud, but the vapors are acidic. Creatures in the fog take escalating acid damage: 1 point round 1, 2 round 2, 4 round 3, 8 round 4 and each subsequent round. Plants die in 2–16 rounds depending on size. Immune to Gust of Wind — only fire (Fireball, Flame Strike, Wall of Fire) can destroy it in 1 round.

Material component: Dried and powdered peas and powdered animal hoof.

DEATH SPELL (Necromancy) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: Instantaneous | Area: 30-ft cube/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Instantly kills a number of creatures based on their HD. Roll 4d20 — this is the "death pool." Subtract the HD of each creature killed from the pool, starting with lowest HD and working upward. Creatures slain by this spell cannot be raised by any means short of Wish. Not effective against creatures with 9+ HD, lycanthropes, undead, or extraplanar creatures.

HD/LevelDeath Factor
Under 21
2 to 42
4+1 to 6+310
6+4 to 8+320

Material component: A crushed black pearl worth at least 1,000 gp.

DEMI-SHADOW MAGIC (Illusion) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 60 yards + 10 yards/level | Duration: Special | Area: Special | Comp: V, S | Save: Special (disbelief)*

As Shadow Magic but can duplicate Evocation spells of 5th level or lower. If disbelieved, effects are 40% effective.

DISINTEGRATE (Transmutation) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 5 yards/level | Duration: Instantaneous | Area: 1 creature or 10 × 10 × 10-ft cube | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Fortitude negates

A thin green ray permanently destroys its target — living or undead creature, or a single non-artifact object. Creatures reduced to dust by this spell cannot be raised without a Wish. If a creature saves successfully, its equipment is also safe. If they fail, all worn items must save independently vs. disintegration.

Material component: A lodestone and a pinch of dust.

ENCHANT AN ITEM (Universal) Level 6 | CT: Special | Range: Touch | Duration: 2 days + 1d8 days | Area: 1 item | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will negates (item)*

The prerequisite enchantment for all permanent magical item creation. Opens the magical pathways in a prepared vessel, making it ready for further enchantments. Requires 8 hours of uninterrupted handling per day for the duration. No other magical items may be within 10 metres during this time. At the end of the duration, the caster makes a Will save — failure means the process must restart from scratch. On success, the caster has 24 hours to begin casting additional spells into the vessel before the pathways close.

Material component: Rare materials specific to the item being created, determined through role-playing and research.

ENSNAREMENT (Conjuration) Level 6 | CT: 1 turn | Range: 10 yards | Duration: Special | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Intelligence check (modified)*

Lures an extraplanar creature through a gate into a prepared warding circle. The creature must fail an Intelligence check to be drawn in. If no warding circle is present, the creature arrives freely and attacks. The caster can attempt to negotiate a service in exchange for the creature's release.

Warding circles: A hand-drawn circle (1 turn, 1,000 gp, 20% base failure) or a permanent carved circle (3 days, 5,000 gp, 10% base failure). Each day of confinement weakens the circle by 2%. Any imperfection in the circle's perimeter — a hair, a thread — immediately frees the captive.

EXTENSION III (Transmutation) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 0 | Duration: Special | Area: Special | Comp: V | Save: None

As Extension I, but doubles the duration of 3rd-level or lower wizard spells, and extends 4th- or 5th-level spells by 50%.

EYE BITE (Enchantment, Illusion) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 20 yards | Duration: 1 round/3 levels | Area: 1 creature/round | Comp: V, S | Save: Will (modified)*

The caster gains a gaze attack, used once per round by meeting a target's eyes and speaking a command word. Choose one effect at memorization (cannot be changed during duration):

Charm: Functions as Charm Monster; charmed creatures may be forced to dangerous actions normally against their will.

Fear: Target flees at full speed for 1d4 rounds; for 1 turn per level after, has 50% chance to cower or flee if the caster approaches.

Sicken: All ability scores and movement halved for 1 turn per level; ability scores return at 1 per turn of rest.

Sleep: As Sleep but no HD restriction; Aelár and half-Aelár resist normally.

Undead and creatures from other planes are immune. If the gaze is reflected, the caster is the target.

FREEZING SPHERE (Transmutation, Evocation) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: Special | Duration: Special | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Special*

Choose one effect at casting:

Frigid Globe: Creates a globe of absolute-zero temperature that freezes up to 100 square feet of water per caster level into solid ice (6 inches deep, lasting 1 round/level).

Cold Ray: A narrow ray extending 10 yards per level deals 1d4+2 cold per level to the first creature it hits (Reflex = miss entirely; ray continues past a successful save to the next creature in line).

Globe of Cold: A hurled sphere that explodes on impact for 6d6 cold in a 10-foot radius (Reflex half). If not thrown within 1 round/level, explodes automatically.

Material component: Varies by effect — thin crystal sheet (Frigid Globe); white sapphire worth 1,000 gp (Cold Ray); diamond worth 1,000 gp (Globe of Cold).

GEAS (Enchantment) Level 6 | CT: 4 | Range: 10 yards | Duration: Until completed or death | Area: 1 creature | Comp: V | Save: None

Places a magical compulsion on the target to carry out a specified task. The task must be possible — it cannot require suicidal action — but can be difficult or dangerous. The target does not receive a saving throw. Refusing or delaying the geas causes the target to weaken: −2 to ability scores per week of refusal. Remove Curse, Wish, or Limited Wish can end it.

GLASS SEE (Transmutation) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: Touch | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: Up to 4 sq ft/level | Comp: V, S | Save: None

Makes any solid material — stone, wood, metal, flesh — temporarily transparent, allowing vision through up to 4 inches per caster level of material. The caster can see normally through the transparent area but cannot see through lead. Creatures cannot see through the affected area from the other side.

GLOBE OF INVULNERABILITY (Abjuration) Level 6 | CT: 1 | Range: 0 | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: 10-ft radius around caster | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

As Minor Globe of Invulnerability, but blocks spells of 4th level or lower from entering. Spells cast outward from within the globe pass through normally.

Material component: A small crystal sphere.

GUARDS AND WARDS (Transmutation, Enchantment, Evocation) Level 6 | CT: 3 turns | Range: 0 | Duration: 2 hours/level | Area: Up to 200 sq ft/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Secures a large area — a tower, dungeon level, or building floor — with multiple defensive effects simultaneously: corridors filled with fog, stairs covered in grease, doors locked with Wizard Lock, intersection-triggered confusion, and mirror images of the caster at key locations. The specific effects and their placement are determined at casting within the area limits. A 2d4 penalty to saving throws against further confusion effects applies to any creature in the area.

Material component: Various items depending on effects used — burning incense, a tiny silver rod, a piece of phosphorus.

INTENSE TRANSFORMATION (Transmutation, Evocation) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 0 | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: The caster | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

An extreme version of Polymorph Self that also grants one of the new form's supernatural abilities (breath weapon, gaze attack, or similar) for the spell's duration. The caster gains the full physical capabilities of the form plus one chosen special ability. The caster must survive the transformation — System Shock check required if the form's physical mass differs dramatically from the caster's.

Material component: A scale, feather, or skin fragment from the desired form.

INVISIBLE STALKER (Conjuration) Level 6 | CT: 1 round | Range: 10 yards | Duration: Until mission is completed | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Summons an Invisible Stalker — a neutral elemental servant from the Air Plane — to perform one task. The task must be clearly stated; the Stalker follows instructions to the letter, not the intent, and is not loyal to the caster's goals. The Stalker cannot be returned to its plane until it completes its mission; if given an unreasonably complex task, it finds the most literal fulfillment possible. The Stalker has 8 HD and is always invisible.

Material component: Burning incense and a piece of horn.

LEGEND LORE (Greater Divination) Level 6 | CT: Special | Range: 0 | Duration: Special | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Gathers legendary information about a person, place, or object of great importance. Casting time and reliability depend on how much information the caster already knows. With only a name or rough description, casting takes 1d10 days; partial information, 1d6 days; significant information, 1d4 days; the subject in hand, 2d6 rounds. The GM provides a brief legend or critical fact. The information may be incomplete, metaphorical, or obscure.

Material component: Incense worth 250 gp and strips of ivory worth 50 gp.

LOWER WATER (Transmutation; Reversible) Level 6 | CT: 1 turn | Range: 80 yards | Duration: 1 turn/level | Area: 10 sq ft/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Lowers the surface of a body of water within the area by 5% per caster level (minimum 1 foot, maximum 50%). Channels and rivers may be affected enough to permit crossing. Salt water may be lowered by as little as half the normal percentage. Creatures composed of water take 1d6 damage per round in the affected area.

Reversed — Raise Water: Raises a body of water by the same amount.

Material component: A pinch of dust (to lower) or a drop of water (to raise).

MAGE'S LUCUBRATION (Transmutation) Level 6 | CT: 1 | Range: 0 | Duration: Instantaneous | Area: The caster | Comp: V | Save: None

Allows the caster to instantly re-memorize one spell of 5th level or lower that was cast within the past 24 hours. This recovered spell is ready to cast immediately. Can only be used once per day, and the recovered spell must have been cast from the caster's own memorized slots.

MASS SUGGESTION (Enchantment) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 4 turns + 4 turns/level | Area: 1 creature/level in 30-ft radius | Comp: V, M | Save: Will negates

As Suggestion but affects one creature per caster level simultaneously. All affected creatures receive the same suggestion. Creatures that fail their Will save follow the suggestion as if it were their own idea.

Material component: A snake's tongue and honeycomb.

MIRAGE ARCANA (Transmutation, Illusion) Level 6 | CT: Special | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: Special | Area: 10-yard radius/level | Comp: V, S | Save: Will (disbelief)*

As Hallucinatory Terrain, but extends to structures and objects as well as natural terrain. The illusion can include buildings, ruins, a canyon, an oasis — any natural or architectural environment. Duration: permanent until dispelled. Casting time: 1 turn per 10-yard radius.

MISLEAD (Illusion) Level 6 | CT: 1 | Range: 0 | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: S | Save: None

Simultaneously turns the caster invisible (as Improved Invisibility) and creates a duplicate of the caster at the same location. The caster can direct the duplicate's actions (movement, speech, limited gestures) while remaining invisible. The duplicate can speak in the caster's voice, gesture, and move convincingly, but has no substance.

MONSTER SUMMONING IV (Conjuration) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 60 yards | Duration: 5 rounds + 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

As Monster Summoning I, but summons 1d3 creatures of approximately 4 HD. See Appendix C.

MOVE EARTH (Transmutation) Level 6 | CT: Special | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: Permanent | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Moves masses of soil, sand, and earth (not stone) at a rate of 6 feet per round. Can reshape hillsides, fill trenches, redirect streams. Cannot move rock or stone. Moving 3,000 cubic feet requires 1 turn of casting time. The movement rate is slow — creatures have time to step aside unless specifically constrained.

Material component: A mixture of soils in a bag.

PART WATER (Transmutation) Level 6 | CT: 1 turn | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 1 turn/level | Area: 20 × 3 × 30 ft/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Parts a body of water, creating a trough through which the caster and companions can walk. The water walls on either side hold as long as the spell persists. Cannot affect water above 60°C or below freezing.

Material component: Two small blue staves.

PERMANENT ILLUSION (Illusion) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 30 yards | Duration: Permanent | Area: 20-ft cube + 10-ft cube/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will (disbelief)*

As Spectral Force, but permanent until dispelled. The illusion runs on a pre-programmed sequence and requires no concentration. Has visual, auditory, olfactory, and thermal components.

Material component: A bit of fleece.

PROGRAMMED ILLUSION (Illusion) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 30 yards | Duration: Until triggered, then 1 round/level | Area: 20-ft cube + 10-ft cube/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will (disbelief)*

As Permanent Illusion but dormant until a specific trigger condition set by the caster occurs. When triggered, the illusion runs for 1 round per level before becoming dormant again. Can be triggered multiple times.

Material component: A bit of fleece and jade dust worth 25 gp.

PROJECT IMAGE (Transmutation, Illusion) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Projects a perfect illusory duplicate of the caster at any point within range. The caster can see through the duplicate's "eyes." Spells cast from the caster's location appear to originate from the image — a fireball can be launched from the duplicate's position while the caster stands safely elsewhere. The image is destroyed by touch or Disbelief but cannot be harmed by attacks that don't reach it.

Material component: A small mirror.

REINCARNATE (Necromancy) Level 6 | CT: 1 turn | Range: Touch | Duration: Permanent | Area: 1 creature | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Restores a dead creature to life in a new body, determined randomly. The creature must have been dead no longer than one week. The creature retains its memories, personality, and class abilities, but inhabits a wholly new form. Roll 1d100 on the GM's reincarnation table for the new body — possibilities include all common ancestries and a range of humanoids and demi-humans. The new body is that of a young adult.

Material component: Rare oils and incense worth at least 1,000 gp.

REPULSION (Abjuration) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 0 | Duration: ½ round/level | Area: Path 10 ft wide, 10 ft/level long | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates a force field in a corridor-shaped area before the caster. Any creature attempting to move toward the caster in this path is pushed back at double their movement rate. They can move around the path to attack from the side. Ends when the duration expires or when the caster moves.

Material component: A pair of lodestones.

SHADES (Illusion) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 30 yards | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: 20-ft cube | Comp: V, S | Save: Will (disbelief)*

As Shadow Monsters but the creatures have 60% of normal HP. Creatures that disbelieve take 60% damage and fight them as AC 6.

STONE TO FLESH (Transmutation; Reversible) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: Permanent | Area: 1 creature or 10 cu ft | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Fortitude negates (reversed)*

Restores a petrified creature to its normal flesh, immediately and without harm. The creature is fully restored to the state it was in when petrified — wounds, memories, and abilities intact.

Reversed — Flesh to Stone: Turns a living creature to stone permanently. The target makes a Fortitude save. On failure, the creature and all carried items are permanently petrified. A second Stone to Flesh can restore them.

Material component: Crushed lime, earth, and water (Stone to Flesh); limestone and drops of water (Flesh to Stone).

TRANSMUTE WATER TO DUST (Transmutation; Reversible) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: 60 yards | Duration: Permanent | Area: 1 cu yd/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None (special)*

Converts water within the area to fine powder. Creatures composed of water take 1d6 damage per caster level (Fortitude half). Potions in the area must save or be ruined.

Reversed — Dust to Water: Converts powder or dust back to water.

TRUE SEEING (Greater Divination) Level 6 | CT: 6 | Range: Touch | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: Line of sight, 120-ft max | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

The recipient sees all things as they truly are: illusions, polymorphed creatures, invisible creatures, projected images, misleads, disguises. Sees through magical darkness. Sees through up to 4 inches of normal matter. Does not grant vision of astral or ethereal planes unless the creature is currently on the Prime Material.

Material component: Eye ointment made from mushroom powder, saffron, and fat (at least 300 gp).

VEIL (Illusion) Level 6 | CT: 3 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 1 turn/level | Area: 20-ft cube/level | Comp: V, S | Save: Will (disbelief)*

As Seeming but affects any number of willing creatures within the area. Each creature takes on a different appearance chosen by the caster at casting. More versatile than Seeming — can make a dozen guards appear to be a noble's entourage, a tunnel mouth appear to be a wall, or a dragon appear to be an old man.

7th-Level Wizard Spells ​

BANISHMENT (Abjuration) Level 7 | CT: 7 | Range: 20 yards | Duration: Permanent | Area: 60-ft radius | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Magic resistance then Fortitude*

Forces extraplanar creatures — up to 2 HD or levels per caster level total — back to their home planes. The caster must name each creature and type, providing true names where known. Creatures that survive their magic resistance check may save to resist. Each creature that saves successfully deals 2d6 damage to the caster per successful save, and stuns the caster for one round.

Each different material component included — substances dangerous, vile, or opposed to the creature's nature — reduces a creature's magic resistance by 5% and imposes −2 to its save. The GM may allow particularly effective substances to impose up to −4.

Material component: One or more substances opposed to each creature being banished.

BIG GRASPING HAND (Evocation) Level 7 | CT: 7 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

As Big Interposing Hand, but the hand can grasp and hold creatures or objects. A creature weighing up to 450 kg is held motionless; creatures between 450 and 1,800 kg are slowed to MV 1; creatures up to 7,200 kg are slowed by 50%. The hand inflicts no damage and cannot directly attack. The caster can release held creatures or dismiss the hand on command.

Material component: A leather glove.

CHARM PLANTS (Enchantment) Level 7 | CT: 1 turn | Range: 30 yards | Duration: Permanent | Area: 10 × 30 ft | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will negates (intelligent plants)*

The caster can communicate with and command all plant life in the area. Non-intelligent plants obey immediately and can be directed to duplicate the effects of Entangle. Intelligent plant creatures receive a Will save at −4; if they fail, they are charmed as per the Charm spell and receive new saves at intervals based on their Intelligence.

Material component: A pinch of humus, a drop of water, and a twig or leaf.

CONTROL UNDEAD (Necromancy) Level 7 | CT: 1 round | Range: 60 ft | Duration: 3d4 rounds + 1 round/level | Area: 1d6 undead | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will (undead with 4+ HD)*

Directs 1d6 undead creatures to follow the caster's verbal commands. The caster points to a location within range — the closest undead (up to 6 creatures, or total HD not exceeding caster level) are affected first. Mindless undead are controlled automatically; intelligent undead with more than 3 HD receive a Will save. Controlled undead remember their subjugation after the spell ends.

Material component: A small piece of bone and raw meat.

DELAYED BLAST FIREBALL (Evocation) Level 7 | CT: 7 | Range: 100 yards + 10 yards/level | Duration: Up to 5 rounds | Area: 20-ft radius | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Reflex half

As Fireball, but deals 1d6+1 fire damage per caster level (max 10d6+10) and can be held for up to five rounds before detonating. The caster mentally triggers the explosion at any point during the delay. The bead of fire remains visible as a glowing mote during the delay.

Material component: A tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur.

DUO-DIMENSION (Transmutation) Level 7 | CT: 7 | Range: 0 | Duration: 3 rounds + 1 round/level | Area: The caster | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Flattens the caster into a two-dimensional form — height and width, but no depth. When viewed from the side, they are invisible. From the front or rear, they appear normal. They can slip through paper-thin gaps and cracks wide enough for their height and width.

The caster's facing matters constantly. Flank attacks pass harmlessly through them; front and rear attacks deal double damage. Area effects harm them normally. Attacks from astral creatures deal normal damage and have a 25% chance per hit of pulling the caster completely to the Astral Plane, ending the spell.

Material component: A strip of parchment wrapped around an enameled ivory figurine of the caster with gold and platinum filigree and gemstones, worth at least 500 gp (destroyed on casting).

FINGER OF DEATH (Necromancy) Level 7 | CT: 5 | Range: 60 yards | Duration: Permanent | Area: 1 creature | Comp: V, S | Save: Fortitude or 2d8+1 damage*

Points a finger at one creature. A failed Fortitude save results in instant death — the creature cannot be raised, resurrected, or reincarnated without a Wish. Against human and humanoid targets, the caster can perform a special 1,000 gp ritual within 3 days to animate the body as a juju zombie. A creature that saves successfully still takes 2d8+1 damage.

FORCE CAGE (Evocation) Level 7 | CT: 3 (cage) or 4 (cube) | Range: 10 yards per 2 levels | Duration: 6 turns + 1 turn/level | Area: 20-ft cube | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Choose one effect at memorization:

Force Cage: Walls of alternating force bands with half-inch gaps trap creatures within but allow most spell effects to pass through. Magic resistance allows a one-time attempt to pass through the bars.

Force Cube: Solid walls at half the standard effective area, functioning as a Cube of Force. Completely impervious.

Both versions persist until the duration expires or until Dispel Magic succeeds.

Material component: Diamond dust worth at least 1,000 gp (used during memorization, not on casting).

INSTANT SUMMONS (Conjuration) Level 7 | CT: 1 | Range: Any plane | Duration: Instantaneous | Area: 1 small object | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

During a preparation ritual, the caster holds a gem worth at least 5,000 gp and inscribes a chosen item's name into it invisibly. When needed, the caster crushes the gem and calls the item by name — it appears instantly in one hand. The item must be 3 feet square or smaller, weigh no more than 3.6 kg, and be non-living. If another creature possesses the item, the spell fails but reveals the possessor's identity and general location. A Wizard Mark cast during preparation allows the item to be called away from a possessor on the same plane.

Material component: A gem worth at least 5,000 gp (consumed on use).

LIMITED WISH (Conjuration, Evocation) Level 7 | CT: Special | Range: Unlimited | Duration: Special | Area: Special | Comp: V | Save: Special*

A constrained version of Wish capable of three forms of effect:

Duplicating spells: Any wizard spell of 7th level or lower from allowed schools (or 5th level or lower from prohibited schools); any priest spell of 5th level or lower from allowed spheres (or 4th level or lower from prohibited spheres). Variable effects favorable to the caster are maximized. Material components costing under 1,000 gp are not required.

Emulating a Wish: As Wish, but effects are temporary rather than permanent. Duration: 1d6+1 weeks, +1 week per caster level. Casting time: approximately 3 rounds.

Other effects: Any effect at the power level of the above, subject to GM approval.

Casting Limited Wish ages the caster: 1 year if venerable age is 150 years or less, 2 years if 151–250, 3 years if 251–350, and so on.

MAGE'S MAGNIFICENT MANSION (Transmutation, Conjuration) Level 7 | CT: 7 rounds | Range: 10 yards | Duration: 1 hour/level | Area: 300 sq ft/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates a mansion within a pocket dimension accessible through a faint shimmering doorway. The mansion is comfortably appointed with food, furnishings, and an invisible staff of servitors who can cook, clean, and serve. Up to double the caster's level in creatures can be accommodated. The exterior appears as a shimmering portal; the interior is complete and comfortable. Nothing passes between the mansion and the outside world except for those the caster permits to enter. When the spell ends, all occupants are expelled.

Material component: A miniature ivory door, a small piece of polished marble, and a tiny silver spoon.

MAGE'S SWORD (Evocation) Level 7 | CT: 7 | Range: 30 yards | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Conjures a shimmering blade of magical force that attacks under the caster's mental direction. The caster must concentrate to command it; they can move but take no other actions. The sword attacks as a warrior of half the caster's level, always hitting on a natural 19–20. Treats as a +3 weapon for immunity purposes. Deals 5d4 to man-sized targets, 5d6 to large targets. Can hit ethereal, astral, and out-of-phase creatures. Persists until concentration breaks, the sword leaves range, or it is dispelled.

Material component: A miniature platinum sword with a copper and zinc grip and pommel, worth at least 500 gp.

MASS INVISIBILITY (Illusion) Level 7 | CT: 7 | Range: 10 yards/level | Duration: Permanent until broken | Area: 60 × 60 yards | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Renders up to 400 man-sized creatures invisible simultaneously. Large creatures count as 10; Huge or larger count as 50+. The invisibility is permanent but ends for all creatures simultaneously the moment any single invisible creature attacks or takes a hostile action. Creatures that leave the area or fall behind as the group moves become individually visible. As the subjects cannot see each other, coordinated movement may be penalized.

Material component: An eyelash in gum arabic.

MONSTER SUMMONING V (Conjuration) Level 7 | CT: 6 | Range: Special | Duration: 6 rounds + 1 round/level | Area: 70-yard radius | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Summons 1d3 creatures of approximately 5 HD from a random table. Roll 1d12: 1 Cockatrice, 2 Couatl, 3 Giant Hornet, 4 Hydra (7 heads), 5 Pyro/Cryo-Hydra (5 heads), 6 Subterranean Lizard, 7 Minotaur, 8 Ochre Jelly, 9 Giant Poisonous or Spitting Snake, 10 Giant Spider, 11 Winter Wolf, 12 Juju Zombie.

Material component: A tiny bag and a small unlit candle.

PHASE DOOR (Transmutation) Level 7 | CT: 7 | Range: Touch | Duration: 1 use per 2 levels | Area: Special | Comp: V | Save: None

Creates an ethereal passage through a wall, door, or similar barrier, visible only to the caster (and creatures they bring through, up to one person per use). Each passage through costs one usage. Only the caster (and a single companion per use) can traverse it. A higher-level caster is required to dispel it. Can be combined with Pass Wall. Often made permanent in lairs.

POWER WORD, STUN (Conjuration) Level 7 | CT: 1 | Range: 5 yards/level | Duration: Special | Area: 1 creature | Comp: V | Save: None

Stuns one creature. Duration based on current HP at casting: up to 30 HP → 4d4 rounds; 31–60 HP → 2d4 rounds; 61–90 HP → 1d4 rounds. Creatures with more than 90 current HP are unaffected. No save is permitted.

PRISMATIC SPRAY (Conjuration) Level 7 | CT: 7 | Range: 0 | Duration: Instantaneous | Area: 70-ft × 15-ft cone | Comp: V, S | Save: Special per color*

Seven multicolored rays emit from the caster, each with a different effect. All creatures in the cone are struck by at least one ray. Creatures with fewer than 8 HD hit by any ray are additionally blinded for 2d4 rounds (Reflex to avoid). Roll 1d8 for each target to determine which color strikes. If two rays hit, effects resolve in ascending color order.

ColorEffectSave
Red20 fire damageReflex half
Orange40 fire damageReflex half
Yellow80 lightning damageReflex half
GreenDeath; save = 20 damageFortitude
BluePetrification (as Flesh to Stone)Fortitude
IndigoPermanent insanityWill
VioletPlane shift to random planeWill
8 (both)Roll twice, ignoring this result—

REVERSE GRAVITY (Transmutation) Level 7 | CT: 7 | Range: 5 yards/level | Duration: 1/100 second per level | Area: 30 × 30 ft | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Inverts gravity within the area. All unattached creatures and objects fall upward, taking falling damage if they strike a ceiling or overhead surface. When the effect ends, they fall back down, possibly taking damage again.

Material component: A lodestone and iron filings.

SEQUESTER (Illusion, Abjuration) Level 7 | CT: 7 | Range: Touch | Duration: 1 week + 1 day/level | Area: 2-ft cube/level | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will negates (living creatures)*

Renders everything in the area invisible to all forms of sight and divination — scrying, locate, detect. Affected objects are tangible but visually undetectable. Living creatures within the area (unwilling ones save) not only become invisible but fall into suspended animation (as Temporal Stasis) for the duration. True artifacts and relics are immune.

Material component: The eyelash of a basilisk, gum arabic, and a dram of whitewash.

SHADOW WALK (Illusion, Enchantment) Level 7 | CT: 1 | Range: Touch | Duration: 6 turns/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S | Save: Will negates (unwilling)*

Can only be cast in heavy shadow. Transports the caster and up to one additional creature per caster level to the border region between the Prime Material Plane and the Plane of Shadow. While in this border zone, the caster moves at 7 miles per turn relative to the Prime Material Plane and can choose where to re-emerge — though the blurred terrain prevents scouting. Can also be used to travel to other planes bordering the Shadow Plane, though the transit requires 1d4 hours and at least one encounter check.

SIMULACRUM (Illusion) Level 7 | CT: 12 hours | Range: Special | Duration: Permanent | Area: 1 creature | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates a quasi-real duplicate of any creature with HD or levels up to twice the caster's level. The base simulacrum is a mindless construct, obedient to simple commands, with 20–50% of the original's level/HD and 51–60% of its maximum HP. It can be destroyed by a standard Dispel Magic; if killed, it melts to water vapor immediately.

Stage 1 Enhancement: A Reincarnate spell infuses the construct with a spirit, granting intelligence, wisdom, and charisma at one-third the original's scores. It gains one language, a self-preservation instinct, and an alignment.

Stage 2 Enhancement: A Limited Wish grants 40–65% of the original's mental attributes along with partial memories and personality. At this stage the simulacrum may resist commands sharply contrary to the original's alignment.

A damaged simulacrum can be repaired with 100 gp of ruby dust per HP restored and 12+ hours of laboratory work.

Material component: A life-sized ice or snow body, powdered ruby, and a small piece of the creature being duplicated (feather, scale, hair, fang).

SPELL TURNING (Abjuration) Level 7 | CT: 7 | Range: 0 | Duration: Up to 3 rounds/level | Area: The caster | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Deflects spells targeting the caster back at their origin. The GM secretly determines the number of spell levels the protection can handle (1d4+6, between 7 and 10). When a deflected spell's level exceeds remaining capacity, it is partially deflected — both casters take a proportional fraction of the effect, and Spell Turning ends.

If both casters have Spell Turning active simultaneously, a resonance field forms:

1d100Effect
01–70Colorful but harmless; spell dissipates
71–80Both casters take full effect (save allowed)
81–97Both Spell Turning effects are nullified for 1d4 rounds
98–00A rift opens, sending both casters to a random inner plane (no save)

Material component: A small silver mirror.

STATUE (Transmutation) Level 7 | CT: 7 | Range: Touch | Duration: 1 hour/level | Area: 1 creature | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Fortitude (18% − Constitution score chance of death on transformation)*

Transforms the recipient and all worn/carried equipment into solid granite. The initial transformation takes a full round; there is an 18% chance minus the subject's Constitution score of dying during the transformation. Once in statue form, the subject can return to flesh at will for the duration — but only for action, then returns to stone. Returning to stone doesn't repeat the mortality check. In statue form the subject is invulnerable to normal weapons; it retains its senses and current HP.

Material component: Lime, sand, and a drop of water stirred by an iron bar.

TELEPORT WITHOUT ERROR (Universal) Level 7 | CT: 2 | Range: Touch | Duration: Instantaneous | Area: Special | Comp: V | Save: None

As Teleport but with no chance of mishap — the caster always arrives on target. Can carry up to 500 lbs of living or nonliving material per caster level (total). Operates across planes with a successful Fortitude save. Creatures can be teleported without their consent — they receive a Will save to resist.

VANISH (Transmutation) Level 7 | CT: 2 | Range: Touch | Duration: Special | Area: 1 object | Comp: V | Save: None

Teleports one object to wherever the caster desires within the current plane (same rules as Teleport Without Error). Alternatively, the caster can send the object to the Ethereal Plane, where it remains until magically retrieved. Objects in the Ethereal Plane can be found with Locate Object.

VISION (Greater Divination) Level 7 | CT: 7 | Range: 0 | Duration: Special | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

The caster seeks a vision of a specific creature, place, or object. The vision comes as a brief but vivid scene, not a full explanation. The reliability and detail depend on how much the caster already knows. If the caster asks for forbidden or heavily protected information, the vision may provide false, metaphorical, or partial answers. The caster may age by 1d10 years when seeking dangerous visions.

Material component: Rare incense, the caster's holy symbol, and a sacrifice appropriate to the information sought.

8th-Level Wizard Spells ​

ANTIPATHY–SYMPATHY (Enchantment) Level 8 | CT: 6 turns | Range: 30 yards | Duration: 2 hours/level | Area: 10-ft cube/level or 1 object | Comp: V, S, M | Save: Will negates*

Choose one effect at casting:

Antipathy: Designates a creature type or alignment. Creatures of that type or alignment entering the area or touching the object feel an overpowering revulsion and must save or flee immediately, unable to approach within 10 feet of the area.

Sympathy: Designates a creature type or alignment. Such creatures feel an irresistible attraction and must save or move toward and remain near the area or object for the duration, unable to leave voluntarily.

Material component: A lump of alum soaked in vinegar (Antipathy) or a lump of honey mixed with rose petals (Sympathy).

BIG CLENCHED FIST (Evocation) Level 8 | CT: 8 | Range: 5 yards/level | Duration: 1 round/level | Area: Special | Comp: V, S, M | Save: None

Creates a huge disembodied fist that strikes one target per round on the caster's mental command. No concentration required once cast. The fist has AC 0, HP equal to the caster's maximum, and saves as the caster.

1d20ResultDamage
1–11Glancing blow1d6
12–15Solid punch2d6
